release.commit_message:
chore(deprecation): warn image users to migrate from unsafe fork

Constraint: The published Docker image includes obsolete Overseerr Anime bits and known unfixed axios CVE exposure.
Rejected: Shipping another image refresh | Would continue distributing an unsafe and unmaintained fork.
Confidence: high
Scope-risk: narrow
Directive: Keep startup warnings and README deprecation language aligned with source-branch notices.
Tested: prettier --check README.md; bash -n s6 run scripts; git diff --check
Not-tested: Container boot log smoke test.
